title: 'VPNs are lawful technical tools,' says EU Court in landmark Anne Frank copyright ruling
summary: Providers are not liable for users bypassing restrictions ⚖️ @torrentfreak https://t.co/fLwb5kYAy1 July 17, 2026 The legal tug-of-war began when a coalition of Dutch and Belgian academic institutions published a free, scholarly online edition of Anne Frank's manuscripts.
